message:
Migrate pages/analytics.rs and pages/export.rs from rusqlite to frankensqlite

Analytics: Convert 13 prepare/query_map patterns to query_map_collect, 4 query_row
to query_row_map. Work around frankensqlite COALESCE(SUM()) limitation by using
Option<i64> + unwrap_or(0). Replace ROW_NUMBER() OVER window function with
Rust-side top-5 filtering. All 10 tests pass.

Export: Convert streaming prepared-statement loop to batch query_map_collect +
iteration. Replace rusqlite::OpenFlags with frankensqlite compat open_with_flags.
Convert transaction inserts from prepared statements to tx.execute_params().
Replace insert().last_insert_rowid with SELECT last_insert_rowid() query.
All 33 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
